50.$description: used to distinguish from white to neutral-200, this would be used for a component/element background, not a canvas background

150.$description: used for background components that needs a highlight from white i.e.: form fields

250.$description: used for hover background for the old neutral-200 default component

350.$description: used for divider & border color for component i.e.: accordion

450.$description: used for elements to work with white background i.e.: border in tab navigation

inverted.$description: Use as white text on color background

default.$description: Use as white text on color background

inverted.$description: Use as white text on color background

default.$description: Use as white text on color background
